title: Research Session Goal
description: The session contract (SPEC §2, §6b): a measurable, transcript-verifiable completion condition the orchestrator runs toward. HARNESS-SIDE, not MIF (SPEC §8b): it references MIF finding @ids but is not itself a MIF concept. Authored by the goal-writer command from the user's raw ask.

topic.description: The topic id this session researches (maps to a harness.config topic).

goal_statement.description: The one decision this session exists to enable. Not 'learn about X' — 'enable decision Y'.

dimensions.description: The config-declared dimensions this session fans out across.

completion_condition.description: The checkable end state. Each check is a transcript-verifiable fact, not a step.

verify.description: Optional command or printable fact that proves the assertion.

bound.description: The turn/coverage bound at which the session stops even if the goal is not fully met.
